_comment: Retrieval eval baseline (#37 -> hard gate, #139). Per-mode mean metrics over the golden corpus. This is now a HARD GATE, not reporting-only: the compose retrieval eval fails the build when any per-mode metric regresses beyond EVAL_GATE_TOLERANCE below these numbers (tests/evals/eval_gate.py), on top of the absolute RETRIEVAL_MIN_RECALL5 floor. A green run on main ratchets these values up to max(current, baseline) per mode/metric (never down) and pushes them back via .github/workflows/integration.yml. Seeded at zeros so the relative gate is a no-op until the first main run measures and ratchets real numbers; the absolute floor guards until then.
